title: All Root To Leaf Paths With Target Sum
hints: Focus on traversing from the root to each leaf, keeping track of the current path and the running sum of node values.
Use Depth First Search to explore each branch, adding the current node to your path and subtracting its value from the target sum.
When you reach a leaf node, check if the remaining target sum is zero; if so, save the current path before backtracking to explore other branches.
